body:
### Security intent

This control validates that **service Identities attached to publicly accessible workloads** across AWS, Alibaba Cloud, Google Cloud, and Azure / Microsoft Entra.

### Access condition reviewed

The assessment reviews identities and access paths and identifies accounts, principals, credentials, or assignments that do not meet the expected access-control state.

### Practitioner note

Identity findings deserve careful cleanup rather than blind deletion. Confirm ownership and business need, remove unnecessary standing access, and prefer federation, groups, roles, MFA, and short-lived credentials over direct long-lived grants.
name: Service Identities attached to publicly accessible workloads
remediationDescription:
## Remediation strategy
1. Remove unnecessary public exposure from workloads.
2. Replace broad identity permissions with least privilege.
3. Use dedicated identities per workload.

### References
- https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/best-practices.html
- https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/using-iam-securely
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/active-directory/managed-identities-azure-resources/overview
description: Service Identities attached to publicly accessible workloads
